name: prowlr-hub
description: War Room multi-agent coordination — connect multiple Claude Code terminals into one team
author: ProwlrBot

tools.name: check_mission_board
tools.description: See all tasks, owners, priorities, and progress

tools.name: claim_task
tools.description: Create and/or claim a task with atomic file locking

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Post a progress note on your current task

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark task done and release all file locks

tools.name: fail_task
tools.description: Mark task as failed with a reason

tools.name: lock_file
tools.description: Advisory lock on a file path

tools.name: check_conflicts
tools.description: Check if files are locked before editing

tools.name: get_agents
tools.description: See all connected agents and their status

tools.name: broadcast_status
tools.description: Send a message to all agents

tools.name: share_finding
tools.description: Store a key-value finding for other agents

tools.name: get_shared_context
tools.description: Read findings shared by other agents
